prompt: A 3D render inspired by the reference, featuring abstract geometric shapes on a reflective plane under dramatic lighting, showcasing specular reflections and digital rendering techniques common in computer graphics studies.
prompt_refined: Generate a 3D render, inspired by image 1, showcasing abstract geometric shapes and advanced digital rendering techniques. A dark blue sphere is centrally positioned on a textured, highly reflective plane. Above it, a smaller, lighter sphere is suspended. The reflective plane transitions horizontally from a warm gold foreground to a cool blue-grey background, bisected by a prominent, glowing blue horizontal light band. Dramatic lighting from a warm yellow spotlight above illuminates the spheres and plane, creating sharp shadows and intense specular reflections on all surfaces.
objects: Prominent, glowing blue horizontal light band
